title: Digital Signature Validation Fails Before Execution
scenario: A clinical artifact depends on a digital signature, but signature validation fails before execution.
initial_state: The signed artifact existed during authorization.
state_transition: Digital signature validation fails during execution evaluation.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on the signed artifact.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires verification-eligible evidence when signature validity is required.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the signature supporting the artifact fails validation.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required digital signature validation fails.
clinical_action: Execute clinical action based on invalidly signed artifact
